Name: UAssetManager
Description:
A singleton UObject that is responsible for loading and unloading PrimaryAssets, and maintaining game-specific asset references
  Games should override this class and change the class reference

Variables.Name: ObjectReferenceList
Variables.Description: List of UObjects that are being kept from being GCd, derived from the asset type map. Arrays are currently more efficient than Sets

Variables.Name: bIsGlobalAsyncScanEnvironment
Variables.Description: True if we are running a build that is already scanning assets globally so we can perhaps avoid scanning paths synchronously

Variables.Name: bShouldGuessTypeAndName
Variables.Description: True if PrimaryAssetTypeName will be implied for loading assets that don't have it saved on disk. Won't work for all projects

Variables.Name: bShouldUseSynchronousLoad
Variables.Description: True if we should always use synchronous loads, this speeds up cooking

Variables.Name: bIsLoadingFromPakFiles
Variables.Description: True if we are loading from pak files

Variables.Name: bShouldAcquireMissingChunksOnLoad
Variables.Description: True if the chunk install interface should be queries before loading assets

Variables.Name: bOnlyCookProductionAssets
Variables.Description: If true, DevelopmentCook assets will error when they are cooked

Variables.Name: bIsBulkScanning
Variables.Description: True if we are currently in bulk scanning mode

Variables.Name: bIsPrimaryAssetDirectoryCurrent
Variables.Description: True if asset data is current, if false it will need to rescan before PIE

Variables.Name: bIsManagementDatabaseCurrent
Variables.Description: True if the asset management database is up to date

Variables.Name: bUpdateManagementDatabaseAfterScan
Variables.Description: True if the asset management database should be updated after scan completes

Variables.Name: bIncludeOnlyOnDiskAssets
Variables.Description: True if only on-disk assets should be searched by the asset registry

Variables.Name: NumberOfSpawnedNotifications
Variables.Description: Number of notifications seen in this update
